draft_and_share_a_post_to_your_linkedin: Draft and share a post to your LinkedIn feed with a hook, value, and a clear call-to-action.
fetch_your_linkedin_profile_information_: Fetch your LinkedIn profile information for use in downstream personalization or logging.
integrate_linkedin_into_workflows_share_: Integrate LinkedIn into workflows. Share posts to your personal feed and access your LinkedIn profile information.
share_posts_and_manage_your_linkedin_pre: Share posts and manage your LinkedIn presence
turn_a_blog_post_release_note_or_announc: Turn a blog post, release note, or announcement into a punchy LinkedIn post and share it.
what_do_you_want_to_share_on_linkedin: What do you want to share on LinkedIn?
